sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الضِّيَافَةُ رُكْنًا أَسَاسِيًّا فِي الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ، حَيْثُ تَتَجَاوَزُ مَجَرَّدَ تَقْدِيمِ الطَّعَامِ لِتُصْبِحَ وَاجِبًا أَخْلَاقِيًّا عَمِيقًا.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo se smatra osnovnim stubom arapske kulture, jer ono nadilazi puko posluživanje hrane i postaje duboka moralna obaveza.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered a fundamental pillar of Arab culture, as it goes beyond merely serving food to become a profound moral obligation.

sentences.arabic: يُسْتَقْبَلُ الضَّيْفُ بِحَفَاوَةٍ بَالِغَةٍ وَبِعِبَارَاتِ "أَهْلًا وَسَهْلًا" الَّتِي تَعْنِي أَنَّكَ بَيْنَ أَهْلِكَ وَفِي مَكَانٍ سَهْلٍ.
sentences.translation: Gost se dočekuje s velikom toplinom i izrazima poput "Ahlan wa Sahlan", što znači da ste među svojom porodicom i na ugodnom mjestu.
sentences.translationEn: A guest is welcomed with great warmth and phrases like 'Ahlan wa Sahlan,' which implies you are among family and in a comfortable place.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ الطُّقُوسُ بِتَقْدِيمِ القَهْوَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ المَفُوحَةِ بِالهَيْلِ، مِمَّا يَعْكِسُ كَرَمَ المَضِيفِ وَتَقْدِيرَهُ لِزَائِرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Rituali počinju posluživanjem arapske kafe mirisne na kardamom, što odražava velikodušnost domaćina i njegovo poštovanje prema posjetiocu.
sentences.translationEn: The rituals begin with serving Arabic coffee scented with cardamom, reflecting the host's generosity and appreciation for the visitor.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَجُوزُ لِلضَّيْفِ أَنْ يَرْفُضَ هَذَا الكَرَمَ، لِأَنَّ ذَلِكَ قَدْ يُفْهَمُ كَتَقْلِيلٍ مِنْ شَأْنِ المَضِيفِ.
sentences.translation: Gostu nije prilično da odbije ovo gostoprimstvo, jer bi se to moglo shvatiti kao potcjenjivanje domaćina.
sentences.translationEn: It is not appropriate for a guest to refuse this hospitality, as that might be understood as belittling the host.

sentences.arabic: تَعُودُ جُذُورُ هَذِهِ التَّقَالِيدِ إِلَى العُصُورِ القَدِيمَةِ حَيْثُ كَانَتِ الصَّحْرَاءُ تَتَطَلَّبُ التَّعَاوُنَ وَالإِيثَارَ.
sentences.translation: Korijeni ovih tradicija sežu u davna vremena kada je život u pustinji zahtijevao saradnju i nesebičnost.
sentences.translationEn: The roots of these traditions date back to ancient times when the desert required cooperation and altruism.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا، تَبْقَى الضِّيَافَةُ رَمْزًا لِلنُّبْلِ وَالأَصَالَةِ فِي المُجْتَمَعَاتِ العَرَبِيَّةِ المُعَاصِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tako gostoprimstvo ostaje simbol plemenitosti i autentičnosti u savremenim arapskim društvima.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, hospitality remains a symbol of nobility and authenticity in contemporary Arab societies.
